channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jets holdout sued for $1.6 million; allegedly failed to pay business partner, sent 'security' to scare him off
item.description: As he continues his bizarre holdout that has cost him nearly $9 million, Haason Reddick is being sued for $1.6 million after allegedly stiffing, and trying to scare off, a business partner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Carpenter delivers pinch-hit RBI single for Tigers in Game 5, limping to first with hamstring injury
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Kerry Carpenter delivered again for the Tigers. Slowed by a hamstring injury, Carpenter hit a pinch-hit RBI single in the fifth inning Saturday to give Detroit a 1-0 lead over the Cleveland Guardians in Game 5 of the AL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senga's comeback to continue with start for Mets in Game 1 of NLCS vs Dodgers
item.description: New York Mets pitcher Kodai Senga will start Game 1 of the National League Championship Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers, continuing his unlikely comeback from injuries that limited him to two starts this season.
item.dc:creator: Jerry Beach, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Patriots’ Robert Kraft says Jabrill Peppers is ‘gone’ if disturbing domestic violence allegations are true
item.description: New England Patriots owner Robert Kraft said this week that if the allegations against safety Jabrill Peppers are true, "he's gone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boxer Mike Tyson shares message of support to embattled music mogul Diddy: 'I wish him all the best'
item.description: Sean "Diddy" Combs has been associated with Mike Tyson over the decades. The rapper has been jailed since his September arrest on federal sex trafficking and racketeering charges.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oklahoma and Texas, one of college football's most storied rivalries, open a new chapter in the SEC
item.description: NORMAN, Okla. (AP) — Perhaps the only way the Oklahoma-Texas rivalry could have become even more intense happened when both joined the powerful Southeastern Conference in July. The series that began in 1900 immediately will rank with the best of the SEC’s older ones — Alabama vs.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rising returns, but Utes fall flat against ASU, 27-19
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising was back at quarterback, but the Utes offense continued to struggle to score touchdowns in a 27-19 loss at Arizona State Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rick Pitino makes surprise visit to Kentucky, says 'I'm so happy to be back' to support Mark Pope
item.description: LEXINGTON, Ky. (AP) — Rick Pitino was wildly cheered in a surprise return to Rupp Arena, with the Hall of Fame coach saying “I am so happy to be back” in a show of support for first-year Kentucky coach and former captain Mark Pope on Friday night at the Big Blue Madness public practice.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Yamamoto outduels Darvish in historic matchup as Dodgers beat Padres 2-0 to reach NLCS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers shelled out $1 billion for Japanese talent in the offseason and it's paying off in the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Harrison Butker endorses Donald Trump: 'The most pro-life president'
item.description: In an appearance on "The Ingraham Angle" Thursday night, Kansas City Chiefs kicker Harrison Butker announced his support for Donald Trump in this year's election.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Taylor Swift fans side with Caitlin Clark after Angel Reese interviews Travis Kelce's ex-girlfriend
item.description: Taylor Swift fans are flocking to support Caitlin Clark, a lifelong Chiefs fan, after Angel Reese interviewed the ex-girlfriend of Swift's boyfriend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nick Saban on Tua Tagovailoa's potential retirement after repeated brain injuries: 'I hate it'
item.description: Tua Tagovailoa's former college coach, Nick Saban, offered insight into his discussions with the quarterback over his NFL future after his third concussion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall will return to practice for the 1st time since he was shot
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall is set to return to practice next week for the first time since he was shot in the chest in a robbery attempt nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A.J. Foyt still drawing big crowds on or off the track in Indianapolis
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — As the sun sets on a perfect, late summer evening, A.J. Foyt sits inside his wine vault in Speedway, Indiana. He's getting regular updates on the expanding line that snakes around tables, through the bar, out the front door, down Main Street and around the corner for two blocks.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers will start Yamamoto against San Diego's Darvish in winner-take-all Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani will get his wish to see Los Angeles Dodgers teammate Yoshinobu Yamamoto face off against San Diego's Yu Darvish in Game 5 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fruita Softball wins 13th straight to take home Southwestern League title
item.description: Attention Colorado high school softball teams: you do not want to see the Fruita Monument Wildcats right now.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Gerrit Cole tosses playoff gem, shutting down Royals and sending Yankees back to ALCS with 3-1 win
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Gerrit Cole pitched like a postseason ace Thursday night, holding the Kansas City Royals to a single run over seven innings and sending the New York Yankees to a 3-1 victory that put them back in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lucha Libre on the rise on the West Coast
item.description: It's not an uncommon sight here in the Bay Area: Hispanic heritage on display -- the outfits, the dancing.
item.dc:creator: Jack Molmud, NewsNation

item.title: Report: Cam Rising to start tomorrow at Arizona State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It looks like Cam Rising is ready to return to the field. According to a report by ActionNetwork's Brett McMurphy, Rising will start at quarterback for the #16 Utah football team tomorrow night at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Video: Wind tears roof off Tropicana Field, home of the Rays
item.description: Hurricane Milton made landfall in Siesta Key south of St. Petersburg, and while the city avoided some of the worst storm surges that doesn't mean the city avoided major effects from the storm.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, KTLA 5

item.title: Lakers show off California Destiny City Edition uniforms, new-look court
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers are showing off some brand-new uniforms and a few changes to Crypto.com Arena court ahead of the 2024-25 NBA season. The California Destiny City Edition uniform incorporates a black and purple gradient and replaces the iconic Lakers lettering with Lake Show on the front.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Whittingham not ready to hand keys over to Wilson yet
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With so much uncertainty as to when Cam Rising will be able to return at quarterback for the Utah football team, is there a point when head coach Kyle Whittingham will move on from Rising and hand the keys to the offense over to freshman Isaac Wilson? "There is
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
